creator: vsityz@gmail.com
text:
dns/noip not update ip address on account http://www.No-IP.com/

noip2 -S     
1 noip2 process active.

Process 20342, started as noip2 -c /usr/local/etc/no-ip2.conf, (version 2.1.9)
Using configuration from /usr/local/etc/no-ip2.conf
Last IP Address set 78.111.187.78
Account *****@gmail.com
configured for:
	host  *******.sytes.net
Executing username=*****%40gmail.com&pass=******&h[]=******.sytes.net upon successful update.
Updating every 5 minutes via /dev/tun0 with NAT enabled.

ifconfig tun0
tun0: flags=8051<UP,POINTOPOINT,RUNNING,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
	options=80000<LINKSTATE>
	inet 10.133.71.189 --> 195.128.182.26 netmask 0xffffff00
